# HTTP route reference

Every HTTP endpoint Bright Guard's control plane exposes. The auth column says what the route demands:

- **public** — no credential required.
- **session** — cookie or device-flow bearer token; the user must be signed in.
- **org member** — session plus membership of the org in the URL path.
- **org admin** — session plus owner/admin role in the org.
- **platform admin** — session plus the platform-admin role.
- **gateway** — gateway-issued bearer credential (no cookies).

| Method | Path | Auth | Handler |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/dev/enabled` | public | `(inline)` |
| POST | `/api/device/approve` | session | `handleDeviceApprove` |
| POST | `/api/device/deny` | session | `handleDeviceDeny` |
| GET | `/api/device/lookup` | session | `handleDeviceLookup` |
| GET | `/api/healthz` | public | `(inline)` |
| POST | `/api/invitations/{id}/accept` | session | `handleAcceptInvitation` |
| POST | `/api/invitations/{id}/decline` | session | `handleDeclineInvitation` |
| GET | `/api/me` | session | `handleMe` |
| GET | `/api/me/invitations` | session | `handleListMyInvitations` |
| GET | `/api/orgs` | session | `handleListOrgs` |
| POST | `/api/orgs` | session | `handleCreateOrg` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/activity` | org member | `handleListActivity` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/activity/summary` | org member | `handleActivitySummary` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/callers` | org member | `handleListCallers` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/callers/{id}` | org member | `handleGetCaller` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/callers/{id}/acknowledge` | org member | `handleAcknowledgeCaller` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/exposures` | org member | `handleListExposures` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/gateways` | org member | `handleListGateways` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/gateways` | org member | `handleCreateGateway` |
| DELETE | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/gateways/{gatewayId}` | org member | `handleDeleteGateway` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/gateways/{gatewayId}` | org member | `handleGetGateway` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/gateways/{gatewayId}/enrollment-tokens` | org member | `handleReissueEnrollment` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/invitations` | org member | `handleListInvitations` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/invitations` | org admin | `handleCreateInvitation` |
| DELETE | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/invitations/{id}` | org admin | `handleRevokeInvitation` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections` | org member | `handleListConnections` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections` | org member | `handleCreateConnection` |
| DELETE | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections/{id}` | org member | `handleDeleteConnection` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections/{id}` | org member | `handleGetConnection` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections/{id}/authorize` | org member | `handleStartOAuthAuthorize` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-connections/{id}/discover` | org member | `handleDiscoverConnection` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-servers` | org member | `handleListServers` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-servers/{id}/reclassify-exposure` | org member | `handleReclassifyExposure` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-servers/{serverId}` | org member | `handleGetServer` |
| PATCH | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/mcp-servers/{serverId}/capabilities/{capId}` | org member | `handleSetCapabilityEnabled` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/members` | org member | `handleListMembers` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies` | org member | `handleListPolicies` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies` | org member | `handleCreatePolicy` |
| DELETE | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies/{id}` | org member | `handleDeletePolicy` |
| GET | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies/{id}` | org member | `handleGetPolicy` |
| PATCH | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies/{id}` | org member | `handleUpdatePolicy` |
| POST | `/api/orgs/{orgId}/policies/{id}/simulate` | org member | `handleSimulatePolicy` |
| GET | `/api/platform/activity` | platform admin | `handlePlatformActivity` |
| GET | `/api/platform/admins` | platform admin | `handlePlatformListAdmins` |
| GET | `/api/platform/audit` | platform admin | `handlePlatformAudit` |
| GET | `/api/platform/orgs` | platform admin | `handlePlatformListOrgs` |
| DELETE | `/api/platform/orgs/{id}` | platform admin | `handlePlatformDeleteOrg` |
| GET | `/api/platform/orgs/{id}` | platform admin | `handlePlatformGetOrg` |
| POST | `/api/platform/orgs/{id}/suspend` | platform admin | `handlePlatformSuspendOrg` |
| GET | `/api/platform/overview` | platform admin | `handlePlatformOverview` |
| GET | `/api/platform/users` | platform admin | `handlePlatformListUsers` |
| DELETE | `/api/platform/users/{id}` | platform admin | `handlePlatformDeleteUser` |
| GET | `/api/platform/users/{id}` | platform admin | `handlePlatformGetUser` |
| POST | `/api/platform/users/{id}/demote` | platform admin | `handlePlatformDemote` |
| POST | `/api/platform/users/{id}/promote` | platform admin | `handlePlatformPromote` |
| POST | `/api/platform/users/{id}/suspend` | platform admin | `handlePlatformSuspendUser` |
| POST | `/api/platform/users/{id}/unsuspend` | platform admin | `handlePlatformUnsuspendUser` |
| GET | `/api/sessions` | session | `handleListSessions` |
| POST | `/api/sessions/active-org` | session | `handleSetActiveOrg` |
| DELETE | `/api/sessions/{id}` | session | `handleRevokeSession` |
| POST | `/auth/dev/login` | public | `Dev.Handler` |
| GET | `/auth/google/callback` | public | `Google.CallbackHandler` |
| GET | `/auth/google/start` | public | `Google.StartHandler` |
| POST | `/auth/logout` | public | `handleLogout` |
| GET | `/oauth/connect/callback` | public | `handleOAuthCallback` |
| POST | `/oauth/device` | public | `handleDeviceInitiate` |
| POST | `/oauth/device/poll` | public | `handleDevicePoll` |
| POST | `/v1/gateway/heartbeat` | gateway | `handleGatewayHeartbeat` |
| POST | `/v1/gateway/observations` | gateway | `handleGatewayObservations` |
| POST | `/v1/gateway/register` | public (enrollmentToken in body) | `handleGatewayRegister` |
